{{Quote|But your papers indicate that only 20 cubic meters of spice is aboard your vessel. I'm just eyeing it but I'll guess there are at least 22 cubic meters. I suggest you recalculate your load or else you could be found guilty of defrauding the Imperial Office of Customs.|Babel Torsch|<ref name="GG6-1" />}}
'''Babel Torsch''' was the [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] office head in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]]. He was known as a by-the-book customs official with no tolerance for the slightest infraction.

==Biography==
Babel Torsch proved himself to the Empire early in his career as a bureaucrat. He then
held a position as an advisor to the consular general of [[Adarlon/Legends|Adarlon]], but after targeting the Holo Industry and having many entertainers blacklisted, industry interests blackmailed his superiors into letting him go.

Babel was retrained an appointed as the head of the [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] office in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]] where he excelled at his job of uncovering hidden [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents and corrupt Imperial officers.

==Personality and traits==
Babel Torsch was an egotistical, by-the-books kind of official. He would not tolerate a single infraction and was immune to bribery. Physically he was pudgy and dark-skinned.

==Behind the scenes==
While his last name is spelled "Tors'''c'''h" in the stat box, the describing texts repeatedly spells it "Torsh". In ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', Babel Torsh is the boss of [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|ISB]] investigator [[Cha Raas]] who operated in the Minos cluster.
